name: Factures en attente de normalisation
query: SELECT name AS "Facture:Link/Sales Invoice:200", customer AS "Client:Link/Customer:200", posting_date AS "Date:Date:100", base_grand_total AS "Total (CDF):Currency:140", IFNULL(custom_dgi_status, 'Pending') AS "Statut DGI:Data:120", custom_dgi_error AS "Erreur DGI:Data:320", owner AS "Cree par:Data:160" FROM `tabSales Invoice` WHERE docstatus = 0 AND IFNULL(custom_dgi_status, '') != 'Normalized' ORDER BY posting_date DESC, modified DESC
